# AUTO-GENERATED by tools/epbm_generator/. Hand edits will be lost on the next run.
# REPLACE overrides for vanilla-only buildings that already ship with
# an on_built / on_destroyed block (a plain INJECT would leave theirs intact).
#
# NOTE: any `unique_production_methods` defined inline inside a REPLACE'd
# building gets prefixed with `epbm_` in the block below — without the
# rename the engine would see two PMs with the same name (vanilla + our
# REPLACE) and error. Display names for the renamed PMs are generated
# into epbm_generated_replaced_pms_l_english.yml, aliased back to
# each building's loc key via `$<building>$` so the UI still shows the
# original name.
#
# To customize a building here: copy its full definition into a new .txt
# in this directory. The next generator run will drop it from this file
# and hook your copy in place instead.

# bey_fortress (REPLACE due to existing on_built hook)
REPLACE:bey_fortress = {
	is_special = yes
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = soldiers
	max_levels = 1
	
	employment_size = manpower_employment
	category = defense_category
	
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = small_fort_building

	country_potential = {
		always = no
	}

	expensive = yes


	unique_production_methods = {
		epbm_bey_fortress_maintenance = {
			stone = 0.1
			tools = 0.1
			weaponry = 0.2
			tar = 0.1
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}


	construction_demand = castle_construction

	modifier = {
		local_crown_estate_power = 0.25
		local_manpower = 0.012
		local_defensive = 0.25

		can_recruit_regiment_in_this_location = yes
	}
	

	on_built = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:izmit
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = izmit_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.200 set_variable = izmit_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:bursa
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = bursa_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.201 set_variable = bursa_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:konya
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = konya_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.202 set_variable = konya_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:ankara
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = ankara_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.203 set_variable = ankara_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:kayseri
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = kayseri_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.204 set_variable = kayseri_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:sivas
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = sivas_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.205 set_variable = sivas_variable }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				location = location:smyrna
				location.owner = { NOT = { has_variable = smyrna_variable } }
			}
			location.owner = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.206 set_variable = smyrna_variable }
		}
		else = {
			location = { trigger_event_non_silently = rise_of_the_ottomans.207 }
		}
	
		location = { add_to_variable_list = { name = epbm_buildings target = prev } }
		epbm_on_building_built = yes
	}

	on_destroyed = {
		location = { remove_list_variable = { name = epbm_buildings target = prev } }
		epbm_on_building_destroyed = yes
	}
}

# monastery (REPLACE due to existing on_built hook)
REPLACE:monastery = {
	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = clergy
	
	employment_size = large_religious_building_employment
	
	category = religious_category
	
	rural_settlement = yes
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	
	build_time = religious_building_time
	graphical_tags = { medium_religious }
	
	
	country_potential = {
		modifier:can_have_monasteries = yes
	}
	
	possible_production_methods = {
		monastery_maintenance
		hab_reformed_monastery_maintenance
		composite_nature_maintenance
		single_nature_maintenance
		dual_nature_maintenance
		separate_nature_maintenance
	}
	
	on_built = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				location.owner = { 
					religion = { has_sects = yes }
					is_member_of_international_organization_of_type = { type = sect }
				}
			}
			location.owner = {
				random_international_organizations_member_of = {
					limit = { 
						international_organization_type = international_organization_type:sect
						NOT = {	any_international_organization_enemy = { this = root.owner } }
						NOT = { has_location = root.location }
					}
					add_location_to_international_organization = root.location
				}
			}
		}
	
		location = { add_to_variable_list = { name = epbm_buildings target = prev } }
		epbm_on_building_built = yes
	}

	construction_demand = town_building_construction
	
	modifier = {
		local_clergy_food_consumption = 0.1
		local_clergy_max_literacy = 10
		local_pop_conversion_speed_modifier = 0.1
	}

	on_destroyed = {
		location = { remove_list_variable = { name = epbm_buildings target = prev } }
		epbm_on_building_destroyed = yes
	}
}
